check.action:
Surface the wt error verbatim. Common failures: - Rebase conflict (worktree has divergent commits with target; user must resolve manually, then re-invoke local-merge) - Pre-merge hook failed (project hooks block on test/lint failure; surface the hook output) - Target branch advanced during merge (rare; re-run)
Halt and do not proceed. Do NOT auto-resolve conflicts.

substep.title: Capture Merge Output
